name: The Taming
explicitMods: +20% to all Elemental Resistances
10% chance to Freeze, Shock and Ignite

48% increased Elemental Damage with Hits and Ailments for
each type of Elemental Ailment on Enemy
flavourText: "Moon after moon did Berek make fools
Of the great and Untamed Three
Until malice for a Brother
Slew the hatred of the Other
And Berek did hunt
Alone and free."
- Berek and the Untamed

explicitMods: +32 to Maximum Charges
54% increased Critical Strike Chance during Effect
descrText: Right click to drink. Can only hold charges while in belt. Refills as you kill monsters.

name: Maloney's Mechanism
explicitMods: Has 2 Sockets
Trigger a Socketed Bow Skill when you Attack with a Bow, with a 1 second Cooldown
11% increased Attack Speed
+54 to maximum Life
5% chance to Blind Enemies on Hit with Attacks
flavourText: Midnight tinkering begets midday murdering;
a sinister shaft surreptitiously shot slays a scoundrel.
I will see them again, but not until my work is done.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports projectile skills, and any other skills that chain.
explicitMods: Supported Skills Chain +1 times
Supported Skills have 15% increased Chaining range
Supported Skills Chain 50% more times
socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.
flavourText: "We are all connected. Each of us burns with the same fire.
Queen Hyrri knew that... she chooses to battle still, somewhere
beyond Hinekora's sight. There must be a very good reason."

name: Piscator's Vigil
explicitMods: No Physical Damage
12% increased Attack Speed
25% increased Critical Strike Chance
+345 to Accuracy Rating
Attacks with this Weapon have 113% increased Elemental Damage
Damage with Weapons Penetrates 5% Elemental Resistances
flavourText: "Stone still, amidst the reeds,
breath fogging in the iron cold air.
he sits, he waits, he watches.
A piscatorial vigil, sat by the river,
his cathedral, his patience his unanswered prayer."
- Jojoba Mansell, bard, angler, adventurer

socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.
flavourText: "She fled from the prison of her birth, drawn by the breaking
of that great Silence. At that moment, the universe was changed,
and walls that were once impenetrable became brittle.
A fortress became a shell, and she alone escaped."

name: Inpulsa's Broken Heart
explicitMods: +68 to maximum Life
46% increased Damage if you have Shocked an Enemy Recently
24% increased Effect of Shock

Shocked Enemies you Kill Explode, dealing 5% of
their Life as Lightning Damage which cannot Shock
Unaffected by Shock
flavourText: Don't hesitate; bring death to all, conclusively and swiftly,
or they will give you the same treatment.

35% less Area Damage

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports skills that hit enemies, causing them to gain bonuses while you have resonance of all three elements, and to grant resonance of elements other than the highest one in a hit. There is a maximum of 50 Resonance for each Element. Cannot support triggered skills, instant skills, orb skills, brands, skills with a reservation, or skills used by totems, traps, or mines. Cannot modify the skills of minions.
explicitMods:
Hits with Supported Skills for which the highest Damage Type is Elemental cause you to gain 25 Resonance of other Elements per second for 2 seconds
Lose 5 Resonance per second of each Element you are not gaining
Supported Skills deal 3% more Elemental Damage per 5 of lowest Resonance
Supported Skills penetrate 16% Elemental Resistances while each Resonance is at least 25
Supported Skills deal 10% increased Elemental Damage
socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.

Projectile when Forking

flavourText: Lioneye earned his moniker by killing
three men with a single arrow.

name: Headhunter
explicitMods: +54 to Strength
+47 to Dexterity
+57 to maximum Life
28% increased Damage with Hits against Rare monsters
When you Kill a Rare monster, you gain its Modifiers for 60 seconds
flavourText: "A man's soul rules from a cavern of bone, learns and
judges through flesh-born windows. The heart is meat.
The head is where the Man is."
- Lavianga, Advisor to Kaom

name: Replica Voidwalker
explicitMods: +49 to Dexterity
144% increased Evasion and Energy Shield
30% increased Movement Speed
10% increased Damage taken while Phasing
You have Phasing if you've Killed Recently
Projectiles Chain +1 times while you have Phasing
Celestial Footprints
flavourText: "Test subject was able to walk into the walls of his chamber after breaking a rabbit's neck.
He was not fast enough, however. Suggest we begin excavation to retrieve prototype."

2% of Chaos Damage Leeched as Life during Effect

- Atziri, Queen of the Vaal

name: Solstice Vigil
explicitMods: 40% increased Damage
+59 to maximum Life
Regenerate 9.4 Mana per second
Gain Shaper's Presence for 10 seconds when you kill a Rare or Unique Enemy
Temporal Chains has no Reservation if Cast as an Aura
flavourText: Time, like light, can be refracted into all its myriad colours.
The first shade is beautiful, but the last will drive the unwary insane.

name: The Wise Oak
explicitMods: During Effect, 6% reduced Damage taken of each Element for which your Uncapped Elemental Resistance is lowest
During Effect, Damage Penetrates 8% Resistance of each Element for which your Uncapped Elemental Resistance is highest
descrText: Right click to drink. Can only hold charges while in belt. Refills as you kill monsters.
flavourText: The summer sun dries the soil and burns the leaves.
The autumn rain extinguishes the flames.
The spring bloom shades the wet earth.
Nature is an eternal tug of war.

flavourText: She looked upon her reflection
and trembled, and shook,
until she was not what she saw.
